about.seoDescription: Learn about Ibbil — Saudi Arabia's first integrated marketplace for camel services: insurance, transport, permits, stores, and veterinary care.
about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The first integrated commercial marketplace for all camel-related services in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
about.lead: Ibbil is a specialized platform offering all camel-related services in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
about.body: It includes insurance, transport, and permits, as well as fodder and food stores, camel supplies, and veterinary services. Ibbil is also the main camel trading platform for buying, selling, leasing, and sharing.
about.imageAlt: A man leading a camel across desert dunes at sunset — representing Ibbil platform heritage
about.pillarsSubtitle: Our mission, vision, and values guide every service we build on the platform.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To connect camel owners, merchants, and service providers through one trusted digital platform that simplifies buying, selling, and managing every aspect of camel care.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the leading reference for camel services in Saudi Arabia and the Gulf, supporting heritage, innovation, and Saudi Vision 2030.

values.title: Our Values
values.text: Trust, transparency, and quality — from secure transactions and verified providers to responsive support for every user on the platform.

about.highlightsSubtitle: A complete ecosystem built for the camel community.

items.insurance: Comprehensive camel insurance — protect your herd with trusted policies
items.transport: Safe camel transport across all regions of the Kingdom
items.stores: Browse feed, supplies, and camel products from verified stores
items.veterinary: Book certified veterinarians for on-site camel care
items.permits: Issue and manage electronic permits in simple, clear steps
items.join: Join Ibbil as a merchant or service provider and grow your business
items.vision: Supporting camel heritage and Saudi Vision 2030

about.title: About Us
about.lead: Ibbil is the first platform to offer a complete commercial marketplace for all camel-related services in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
about.body: It covers insurance, transport, and permits, as well as fodder and food stores, camel supplies, and veterinary services — in addition to camel trading, leasing, and sharing. Shop across many stores and benefit from services offered by merchants, veterinarians, and store owners on the Ibbil platform.

transport.seoDescription: Transport your camels safely across Saudi Arabia with Ibbil: choose the truck, driver, and price that suit you.
transport.heroTitle: Transport camels whenever you want, anywhere
transport.heroSubtitle: You can now move your camels anywhere in the Kingdom easily and safely through Ibbil.

images.hero: Camel transport truck on a desert road at golden hour
images.howToBook: Camel owner managing a transport booking on a phone beside a loaded truck
images.service: Transport driver handling a booking on a phone next to a camel truck

choice.title: Freedom to choose
choice.description: Camel owners across Saudi Arabia can choose the truck, its size, the right driver, and a price that works for them.

audience.title: Who can use transport
audience.description: All camel owners can transport camels safely within the Kingdom to any location by following clear transport steps.

price.title: Pick a price that fits
price.description: Once you choose the right truck, you can negotiate freely with your selected driver to agree on a suitable price.

transport.howDescription: Through Ibbil you can choose the truck you want, its type and size, then negotiate with the driver for the right price — so you get a reliable way to move camels anytime, anywhere in Saudi Arabia.

choose.title: 1) Choose the truck
choose.description: Select the truck type and size that fit your camels and trip requirements.

negotiate.title: 2) Agree on the price
negotiate.description: Connect with the right driver and agree on a clear, fair price.

book.title: 3) Confirm and transport
book.description: Confirm trip details, then move your camels safely to your destination in the Kingdom.

transport.footerDescription: After completing the form, your transport price appears. If you accept it, you are redirected to payment via an approved Saudi method, then you receive an order invoice and can track the transport.

register.seoDescription: Complete your camel transport request in clear steps: delivery details, shipment type, and confirmation.

veterinary.seoDescription: Book a certified veterinarian for your camels: clinic visits, field calls, consultations, and medicine delivery through Ibbil.
veterinary.heroTitle: Request a veterinarian for your camels
veterinary.heroSubtitle: We connect you with certified doctors for your camels' comfort and care.

images.hero: A veterinarian examining a camel at a desert farm at golden hour
images.careContent: A veterinarian performing a close-up examination on a camel at a desert farm
images.howToBook: A camel owner booking a veterinary appointment through the Ibbil app

fieldVisit.title: Field visit

consultation.title: Consultation & medicine
consultation.description: Get a medical consultation or have medicines dispensed and delivered to your home at a time that suits you.

veterinary.howDescription: To keep your camels comfortable, Ibbil lets you choose the booking method you prefer — clinic visit, home visit, or medical consultation — and also dispense medicines through the veterinary platform on Ibbil.

confirm.title: 3) Confirm appointment
confirm.description: Review your booking details and confirm the appointment to proceed to payment.

veterinary.footerDescription: After completing the form, your camel treatment price appears. If you accept it, you are redirected to payment via an approved Saudi method, then receive a treatment invoice and your chosen booking method.

insurance.seoDescription: Request a camel transport insurance policy in Saudi Arabia through clear steps and secure payment.
insurance.heroTitle: The first specialized camel transport insurance in the Kingdom
insurance.heroSubtitle: Choose the right policy, submit your request in minutes, and pay securely to receive your insurance policy quickly.

images.hero: Camel transport truck with digital insurance protection in the Saudi desert
images.policyReview: Reviewing a camel transport insurance policy and comparing plan options
images.howToApply: Submitting a camel transport insurance request through the Ibbil platform
images.payment: Secure payment for camel transport insurance with approved payment methods

owners.title: Who can benefit
owners.description: All camel owners in Saudi Arabia can issue a policy that covers transport between regions.

transport.title: Camel transport coverage
transport.description: Purpose-built coverage to protect camels during transport with clear terms and a smooth request flow.

bestPlans.title: Choose the right plan
bestPlans.description: Compare available options and select the policy that matches your transport needs.

insurance.howDescription: Start your request from anywhere in the Kingdom, fill in the required details, then submit for review and issuance.

request.title: 1) Submit request
request.description: Enter the key transport details and provide camel and destination information.

review.title: 2) Review and approval
review.description: The request is validated and reviewed to ensure accurate policy issuance.

issue.title: 3) Pay and issue policy
issue.description: Pay using approved methods, then receive your invoice and insurance policy instantly.

insurance.footerDescription: After completing the form, your policy price is shown and you are redirected to secure checkout. Once payment is complete, your invoice and policy are issued electronically.

register.seoDescription: Complete your camel transport insurance request in clear steps: customer details, shipment info, pricing, and payment.
